utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan states executive health bundle integrating concierge medical services (physical) and enhanced mental health with 24/7 crisis support; includes a concrete cost (€520/month). Fully specified. 
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides a property consolidation package bundling luxury home content and specialized equipment protection; includes a cost (Approximately €281/month). While labeled approximate, it still provides a cost. Adequately specified. 
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan details a tailored travel package with base and medical emergency add-on combined; includes a cost (Approximately €243/month). Adequately specified. 
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists an Executive Insurance Concierge service; includes a cost (€75/month). Fully specified. 
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly and annual totals (Approximately €1,119/month and €13,428/year). Fully specified. All 5 items are present with costs and descriptions aligned to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan uses custom bundle names not directly listed in the ground-truth. To map to ratings, identify the closest corresponding ground-truth options implied by the descriptions: (1) Health coverage references an executive premium bundle with concierge medical and enhanced mental health with 24/7 crisis support, which aligns with EliteCare Premium Plan and PrimeCare Premium Plan at the premium level (both rated 10) across physical and mental health; we choose one concrete mapping name from ground truth, prioritizing a single premium plan—EliteCare Premium Plan (physical) and EliteCare Premium Plan (mental)—but since ground-truth separates physical and mental, the best holistic mapping for an “integrated” executive premium health bundle is EliteCare Premium Plan for both categories, each having rating 10. (2) Property coverage references “PremiumSecure Luxury home content with specialized equipment protection for golf and business equipment,” aligning with the premium home content options; EliteHome Premium Coverage and PrimeHome Premium Coverage both rated 10; choose EliteHome Premium Coverage. (3) Travel coverage references combining ExecutiveGlobal Platinum base travel with Medical Emergency Plus add-on; the closest premium travel plans are EliteTravel Premium Plan or PrimeTravel Premium Plan; choose EliteTravel Premium Plan rated 10. (4) Additional services: “Executive Insurance Concierge service for dedicated advisor support for the family” matches the general service “Premium Insurance Membership” which includes dedicated advisor and priority claims; rating 10.
